description: Write the complete 70-page academic course work HTML document covering pages 1-35 (title page, table of contents, introduction, and Chapter I complete, plus Chapter II sections 2.1-2.2). This is the first half of the document.
steps: Completely rewrite /projects/sandbox/claude-ai/index.html with a full HTML document

Include all CSS styles at the top: @page A4 rules, .page class with 210mm width/297mm min-height/padding 2cm 1.5cm 2cm 3cm, page-break-after: always for print, Times New Roman 16px, line-height 1.5, text-align: justify for body text, centered bold headings, table styles with borders, code block styles with #f5f5f5 background

Page 1: MUQOVA (title page) - centered text with university name, faculty, department, specialization code, subject, KURS ISHI title, topic, student/teacher info, grade line, city-year. All exactly as specified in user requirements.
Page 2: MUNDARIJA (table of contents) with page numbers as specified
Pages 3-7: KIRISH (Introduction, 5 pages) - dolzarblik, maqsad va vazifalar, tadqiqot ob'ekti va predmeti, tadqiqot usullari, ishning tuzilishi. Write comprehensive academic paragraphs in Uzbek.
Pages 8-14: Section 1.1 'Axborot tizimlarining nazariy asoslari' (7 pages) - definitions, history, types, components, lifecycle, examples. Dense academic text.
Pages 15-19: Section 1.2 'Muzqaymoq do'koni faoliyatini avtomatlashtirishning dolzarbligi' (5 pages) - market analysis, business processes, automation benefits.
Pages 20-24: Section 1.3 'Mavjud boshqaruv tizimlarining qiyosiy tahlili' (5 pages) - comparison of existing systems (1C, R-Keeper, iiko), table comparing features.
Pages 25-31: Section 2.1 'Tizimga qo'yilgan talablar va funksional tahlil' (7 pages) - functional and non-functional requirements, use cases description.

Pages 32-35: Section 2.2 first part 'Ma'lumotlar bazasini loyihalash' (4 pages) - start with database design, include ER-diagram as inline SVG showing Mahsulotlar, Buyurtmalar, Mijozlar, Xodimlar entities with relationships
Each page must be a separate div with class 'page'. Every page must have substantial content filling the A4 area.
Include at least one SVG diagram in this section: the ER-diagram showing database relationships
acceptance_criteria: File /projects/sandbox/claude-ai/index.html exists and is valid HTML5
Contains at least 35 page divs with class 'page'
Title page matches the exact text from user requirements (RENESSANS TA'LIM UNIVERSITETI, etc.)
CSS includes @page A4 rules and print media query with page-break
ER-diagram SVG is present showing database tables and relationships
Text is in Uzbek with academic style
File size is at least 100KB (substantial content)
verification: Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/claude-ai/index.html','utf8'); const pages=(html.match(/class=\"page\"/g)||[]).length; const svgs=(html.match(/<svg/g)||[]).length; console.log('Pages:',pages,'SVGs:',svgs,'Size:',(html.length/1024).toFixed(0)+'KB');"
findings: Pages 3-4 (KIRISH introduction) added in a subsequent commit. File now has 4 pages total (cover, TOC, KIRISH page 3, KIRISH page 4).
